name: 3D Q-version Couple Snow Globe

Transform the person in the attached image into a snow globe scene.
Overall environment: The snow globe is placed on a tabletop by the window, with a blurred, warm-toned background. Sunlight passes through the globe, casting golden sparkles that gently illuminate the surrounding darkness.
Inside the globe: The characters are in a cute chibi-style 3D design, gazing at each other with eyes full of love.

## Reference Image
A photo of a couple or another person.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/balconychy/status/1909908568129655248)

## Example Output
![3D Chibi Couple Snow Globe](/media/3d/3d-q-version-couple-snow-globe.webp)
description_en: An image-generation prompt that places a person or couple from a photo as chibi 3D figures inside a sunlit snow globe.
description_zh: 一个图像生成提示词，把照片中的人物或情侣化作 Q 版 3D 角色，放进阳光照射的水晶雪球里。
long_en: The prompt renders a reference photo as cute chibi-style characters inside a snow globe sitting on a tabletop by a window, with sunlight casting golden sparkles. It is intended for sentimental couple or single-person keepsake imagery.
long_zh: 提示词把参考照片渲染成水晶雪球内的可爱 Q 版角色，雪球放在窗边桌上，阳光投下金色光斑，适合制作温馨的情侣或单人纪念图像。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and uploading a personal photo to a third-party service; no code execution.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将个人照片上传到第三方服务；不执行任何代码。
